midazolam.name: Midazolam
midazolam.notes: Predominantly hepatic CYP3A4 metabolism to 1-hydroxymidazolam; minor renal elimination of glucuronide metabolites.

vancomycin.name: Vancomycin
vancomycin.notes: Predominantly cleared by glomerular filtration, largely unchanged; narrow therapeutic index, requires TDM.

morphine.name: Morphine
morphine.notes: Predominantly hepatic UGT2B7 glucuronidation to morphine-3-glucuronide and morphine-6-glucuronide; narrow therapeutic index in neonates due to respiratory depression risk.
